title: Obituary
text:
## Obituary

In loving memory of {person}, who passed peacefully after a long battle with {adjective} laundry and an aggressive {plural noun} collection.

**Early life:** Born in a {adjective} hospital, they spent youth {verb ending in -ing} through fields of {plural noun} and dreaming of {plural noun}.

**Career:** They worked as a {job} for {number} years, retiring to pursue {verb ending in -ing} and competitive {plural noun}.

**Survived by:** {number} cousins, one {adjective} dog, and a goldfish named {person}.

**Services:** Will be held at {place} Cemetery. In lieu of flowers, send {food} and kind {plural noun}.
